TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Bayi, title = Bayi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bayi} }

S.FORM: bayi Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko bayi a niyaro', 30 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 92 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 83 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal83%, Seediq3%, Bunun3%.
S.PHON: b~b~vaji itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u b~b~vaji a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%.
S.FORM: bayi Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko bayi a niyaro', 30 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 92 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 83 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 9 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal83%, Seediq3%, Bunun3%.
S.PHON: b~b~vaji itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u b~b~vaji a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%.
